name: Honeyperl
description: Honeypot software based in Perl with plugins developed for many functions like : wingates, telnet, squid, smtp, etc. Tool: https://sourceforge.net/projects/honeyperl/. [SCAFFOLD generated from XORCISM.TOOL #471 by tool_to_connector.py — implement run() in run.py to map Honeyperl output to the XORCISM findings model {assets, services, cpes, vulns}.]

parameters.name: target
parameters.help: Host, URL or path the tool acts on. When implementing, consider type 'target' or 'url' so the runner enforces the engagement scope.

parameters.name: file
parameters.help: Offline mode: a saved Honeyperl output file to parse instead of running it live.
